News & Updates

News, publications, and opportunities

Recent publications, recruiting notices, conference activities, awards, thesis defenses, graduations, and selected milestones from Yoon Lab.

Latest updates

What is new in Yoon Lab

Selected updates on publications, recruiting, conferences, awards, thesis defenses, graduations, and major lab milestones.

01

Publications

Accepted and published papers from the lab.

02

Recruiting & members

Graduate recruiting, new members, and student milestones.

03

Milestones

Conference participation, awards, thesis defenses, and graduations.

Timeline

Recent news

2026 Fall New member

Uihyeon Lee joined Yoon Lab through the early-start graduate admission track

Uihyeon Lee started graduate research in Yoon Lab through the early-start graduate admission track before the regular Fall 2026 graduate semester. Welcome!

2026.07 Recruiting

Recruiting graduate students for Spring 2027 admission

Yoon Lab is recruiting motivated MS, PhD, and combined MS–PhD students for Spring 2027 admission. Students interested in electrochemical diagnostics, degradation, corrosion, solid-state and polymer electrolytes, or battery safety are encouraged to contact us.

2026.03 Publication

Paper published in Chemical Engineering Journal

Congratulations to Suhyeon Kim and co-authors on the publication of their work on PEO–LiTFSI polymer electrolytes in Chemical Engineering Journal.

2026.01.15 Publication

Paper accepted in Applied Catalysis B: Environment and Energy

Our work on facet-resolved mechanistic insights into OER-selective seawater electrolysis on Co₃O₄ has been accepted. Congratulations to the authors!

2025.11.24 Thesis defense

Congratulations to Suhyeon Kim on her M.S. thesis defense

Suhyeon Kim successfully presented her M.S. thesis defense in the Department of Chemical Engineering. Congratulations!

2025.11 Award

Congratulations to Suhyeon Kim on receiving the Best Paper Presentation Award

Suhyeon Kim received the Best Paper Presentation Award at the KSIEC Fall Meeting for her presentation on coordination structure and oxidative stability of PEO-based solid electrolytes. Congratulations!

2025.11 Conference

Yoon Lab attended KECS Fall Meeting

Yoon Lab members participated in the Fall meeting of the Korean Electrochemical Society.

2025.11 Conference

Yoon Lab attended KSIEC Fall Meeting

Yoon Lab members participated in the Fall meeting of the Korean Society of Industrial and Engineering Chemistry.

2025.05.10 Publication

Paper published in Advanced Functional Materials

Our work on copper corrosion in Li₆PS₅Cl-based all-solid-state batteries has been published. Congratulations to the authors!

2025.04.30 Recruiting

Open positions for MS, PhD, and combined MS–PhD students

Students interested in batteries, electrochemical diagnostics, corrosion, solid-state electrolytes, and polymer electrolytes are encouraged to contact us.

2025.02.20 Publication

Paper published in Chemical Engineering Journal

Our work on aqueous supercapacitors with an ultrawide potential window and pH-independent stability has been published. Congratulations to the authors!

2024.09.02 Recruiting

Recruitment for Fall 2025 graduate students closed

Recruitment for MS, combined MS–PhD, and PhD positions for Fall 2025 was announced and has now closed.

2024.06.15 Recruiting

Recruitment for Spring 2025 graduate students closed

Recruitment for MS, combined MS–PhD, and PhD positions for Spring 2025 was announced and has now closed.

2022.02 Graduation

Graduation ceremony

Yoon Lab members celebrated graduation. Congratulations to the graduates!

2021.11 Conference

Yoon Lab attended KIChE Fall Meeting

Yoon Lab members participated in the Fall meeting of the Korean Institute of Chemical Engineers.

2021.02 Graduation

Graduation ceremony

Yoon Lab members celebrated graduation. Congratulations to the graduates!

2020.07 Conference

Yoon Lab attended KECS Spring Meeting in Jeju

Yoon Lab members participated in the KECS Spring meeting in Jeju.

2019.09 Lab opening

Yoon Lab opened

Yoon Lab began its activities as an electrochemical engineering laboratory.

YOON LAB

Electrochemical Engineering Lab

Quantitative electrochemical diagnostics for interfaces, degradation, and corrosion.
